title: pilosella densiflora subsp. austrosaxonica
intro: Pilosella densiflora subsp. austrosaxonica, also known as Alpine Mouse-ear or Yellow Salsify, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as digestive problems, kidney stones, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pilosella densiflora subsp. austrosaxonica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
